title: PhD
biography: Peter Mansfield was a British physicist who made MRI practical for clinical use by developing echo-planar imaging and mathematical techniques for rapid image reconstruction. Nobel Prize 2003.
aiSummary: Peter Mansfield is a medical physics specialist at University of Nottingham. Based in Nottingham.
